_doc: Fixture for B09 — payload shape for a newly-published article whose title must appear on '/' within 60s. Pre-fix, the public homepage cached the article list at build time and never re-validated, so freshly-published articles never surfaced until a redeploy. Post-fix, '/' is rendered with `revalidate = 60` (Next.js ISR) and the publish endpoint pings a revalidate-tag webhook.
title: Real cost of growth
summary: Growth absorbs cost faster than the income statement reveals.
